name: JEEVHITAA -- An HCAI Ecosystem to Support Collective Care
summary: arXiv:2512.06364v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Current mobile health platforms are predominantly individual-centric and lack the support for coordinated, auditable multi-actor workflows....
description: arXiv:2512.06364v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Current mobile health platforms are predominantly individual-centric and lack the support for coordinated, auditable multi-actor workflows. However, in many settings worldwide, health decisions are enacted through multi-actor coordination rather than individual users. We present JEEVHITAA, a cross-platform mobile system enabling role-awa...
author: Shyama Sastha Krishnamoorthy Srinivasan, Harsh Pala, Mohan Kumar, Pushpendra Singh
